title: Even Integer Definition
statement: An integer n is even iff n=2k for some integer k.

title: Even Square Lemma
statement: If n is even, then n^2 is even.

title: Sum of First n Positive Integers
Degree Sequence Isomorphism Claim
statement: Finite graphs with the same degree sequence are isomorphic.

title: Modus Ponens
statement: From A implies B and A, infer B.

title: Mathematical Induction
statement: A base case and successor-preservation establish a natural-number statement.
